\tzpentry{ID3793}{Curvature Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3793 introduces Curvature Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} R(t) = \left| \frac{1}{N}\sum_{i=1}^{N} e^{i\theta_i(t)} \right|, \label{eq:global_order} \end{equation}
